questionHtml: Based on the mode of transmission of the Ebola virus, suggest a possible reason for the relationship between population density and the number of Ebola cases in these four countries.
markschemeHtml:
greater density means more frequent contact with infected people/animals ✔

Need both greater density and frequency of contact
